questions.question: If Table A has 5 rows and Table B has 10 rows, and they are joined via an INNER JOIN on a column where all rows match exactly 1-to-1, how many rows will be returned?
Which operator is typically used to test if a value is returned by a subquery?
What does a CROSS JOIN produce?
What is a correlated subquery?
options: A subquery that references the outer query
A subquery in the FROM clause
A subquery that returns a single value

questions.question: Which operator cannot be used with a multi-row subquery?
What is a Self Join?
options: A join on primary keys only

questions.question: What is the difference between IN and EXISTS?
options: IN compares values, EXISTS checks for row existence
EXISTS only works with single rows

questions.question: If a LEFT JOIN finds no match in the right table, what happens?
options: Result row contains NULLs for right table columns

questions.question: Which join is equivalent to a comma-separated list of tables without WHERE?
